headline: International Flavors & Fragrances (IFF): The Best High Growth Stock Insiders Are Buying
summary: International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (NYSE:IFF) is one of the 10 High Growth Stocks Insiders Are Buying. On July 1, 2026, Morgan Stanley raised the firm’s price target on International Flavors & Fragrances Inc. (NYSE:IFF) to $95 from $93 and kept an Overweight rating on the shares.
